params.message: {{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\install_ollama.ps1' : 'which ollama && echo OLLAMA_ALREADY_INSTALLED || (curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh && echo OLLAMA_INSTALLED)'}}
{{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\start_ollama.ps1' : 'ollama serve > /dev/null 2>&1 & sleep 5 && echo OLLAMA_STARTED'}}

params.html: ⬇️ Paso 3/5 — Descargando modelo de IA (puede tardar varios minutos)...

params.message: {{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\pull_model.ps1' : (ram < 6 ? 'ollama pull llama3.2:1b && echo MODEL_OK' : ram < 12 ? 'ollama pull llama3.2:3b && echo MODEL_OK' : 'ollama pull llama3.1:8b && echo MODEL_OK')}}

params.html: 🐍 Paso 4/5 — Creando entorno virtual Python e instalando dependencias...

params.message: {{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\setup_venv.ps1' : 'python3 -m venv venv && venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip --quiet && venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && echo DEPS_OK'}}

{{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "@(\"data/agents\",\"data/prompts/system\",\"data/sessions\",\"data/exports\",\"data/brands\",\"data/campaigns\",\"data/audit\",\"data/images\") | ForEach-Object { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $_ | Out-Null }; Write-Host DIRS_OK"' : 'mkdir -p data/agents data/prompts/system data/sessions data/exports data/brands data/campaigns data/audit data/images && echo DIRS_OK'}}

{{platform === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (-not (Test-Path data/agents/agents.json)) { Copy-Item defaults/agents.json data/agents/agents.json }; Get-ChildItem defaults/prompts/*.md | ForEach-Object { $dest = Join-Path data/prompts/system $_.Name; if (-not (Test-Path $dest)) { Copy-Item $_.FullName $dest } }; Write-Host FILES_OK"' : 'cp -n defaults/agents.json data/agents/agents.json 2>/dev/null; for f in defaults/prompts/*.md; do cp -n "$f" data/prompts/system/ 2>/dev/null; done; echo FILES_OK'}}

params.text: {{JSON.stringify({version: '0.2.0', installedAt: new Date().toISOString(), platform: platform, default_model: ram < 6 ? 'llama3.2:1b' : ram < 12 ? 'llama3.2:3b' : 'llama3.1:8b', image_provider: 'auto', diffusion_model: 'SimianLuo/LCM_Dreamshaper_v7', diffusion_steps: 4}, null, 2)}}

params.html:
✅ Instalación completada

Haz click en Iniciar para comenzar a usar CCS Brand Assistant.
